title: MPS Environment Variables
key_claim: PYTORCH_MPS_HIGH_WATERMARK_RATIO=0.0 disables the MPS high watermark limit and may cause system failure; PYTORCH_ENABLE_MPS_FALLBACK=1 enables CPU fallback for unsupported ops.
action_implication: Do not use unsafe watermark disabling as the default fix. Prefer smaller models and safer runtime changes first.

title: torch.mps
key_claim: PyTorch exposes MPS memory introspection and memory fraction controls such as current_allocated_memory, driver_allocated_memory, recommended_max_memory, and set_per_process_memory_fraction.
action_implication: If deeper instrumentation is needed, move notebook logic into a script and measure MPS memory directly.

title: microsoft/deberta-v3-base
key_claim: DeBERTa-v3-base has 12 layers, hidden size 768, and 86M backbone parameters; the model card reports strong MNLI dev performance.
action_implication: Keep as reference quality target only; current local evidence shows it does not fit on this machine for the coursework path.

title: microsoft/deberta-v3-small
key_claim: DeBERTa-v3-small has 6 layers, hidden size 768, and 44M backbone parameters, but still uses a 128K vocabulary with a large embedding layer.
action_implication: Viable fallback, but not the first choice because the embedding footprint remains relatively large.

title: microsoft/deberta-v3-xsmall
key_claim: DeBERTa-v3-xsmall has 12 layers, hidden size 384, 22M backbone parameters, and a 48M embedding layer while retaining DeBERTa V3 architecture.
action_implication: Best next candidate: large reduction from current base model while staying in the same model family.

title: microsoft/MiniLM-L12-H384-uncased
key_claim: MiniLM-L12-H384-uncased is a 12-layer, 384-hidden, 33M-parameter model reported as 2.7x faster than BERT-Base.
action_implication: Best fallback if DeBERTa-v3-xsmall still fails or underperforms.

title: ALBERT model documentation
key_claim: ALBERT was designed to reduce memory consumption through factorized embeddings and cross-layer sharing; albert-base-v2 has 11M parameters, but repeated layers keep compute characteristics less straightforward.
action_implication: Useful memory-first fallback, but lower priority than xsmall and MiniLM because it changes architecture more sharply.

title: distilbert-base-uncased
key_claim: DistilBERT is smaller and faster than BERT and the model card reports 67M parameters.
action_implication: Deprioritize for this branch because it is still much larger than the strongest smaller candidates.
